name: environmental_problem_salience
description: Captures the perceived severity and personal relevance of environmental problems, measuring both macro-level (national) and micro-level (local and household) environmental concern.

name: environmental_knowledge_self_efficacy
description: Measures respondents' self-assessed understanding of environmental causes, solutions, and renewable energy, reflecting perceived cognitive competence to engage with environmental issues.

name: pro_environmental_civic_engagement
description: Measures the extent to which respondents have taken active collective or civic actions in defense of the environment, including petitions, protests, donations, reporting, and attending talks.

name: environmental_governance_attitudes
description: Captures beliefs about who bears responsibility for environmental protection and what regulatory or policy mechanisms should be used, reflecting orientations toward state intervention and corporate accountability.

name: climate_change_risk_perception
description: Measures the degree to which respondents perceive climate change as a real, personally experienced, and socially differentiated threat, including beliefs about its impacts on daily life and vulnerable populations.
